title: mapania sylvatica subsp. sylvatica
intro: Mapania sylvatica subsp. sylvatica is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mapania sylvatica subsp. sylvatica include its ability to ease congestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from coughs and colds. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and rhizomes can be used to make teas, infusions, or poultices for various health conditions.
